query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "eva-bench: a new end-to-end framework for evaluating voice agents" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on a clinical tool for transgender voice transition and gender perception metrics, which is an off-domain application compared to the user's question about an end-to-end evaluation framework for autonomous voice agents in computer science. While both involve "voice," the paper does not address the mechanism, variables, or empirical setting of evaluating LLM-based voice agents, failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f).
